summary: Frontend-only testing of Superhero HQ iteration 2. Verified all changes: side-by-side layout, no tab switcher, unified heading, EP budget inline strip, text sizes, quest selection, Launch Mission, TrackingMode, Volt mascot at 12px. No console errors found.

issues: '— PLANNING MODE' span is hidden on small screens (hidden sm:inline) — acceptable per design, shows on sm+ breakpoints

critical_code_review_comments: FREQ_COLORS in CommandCenter.jsx line 14 no longer has duplicate 'Quarterly' key — fixed from iteration 1
speak() successfully removed from TrackingMode.jsx — verified via grep (no matches)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 changes verified. Planning mode always shows Building (left, ~36%, max 320px) and CommandCenter (right) side-by-side. No tab switcher. Unified heading 'SUPERHERO HQ — PLANNING MODE'. EP budget strip is inline in CommandCenter. Quest text 13px, floor names 13px, room names 12px confirmed via computed styles. Volt bubble text 12px confirmed. speak() removed from TrackingMode. Launch Mission transitions to tracking mode correctly with task cards, streak counter, buffer badge.

test_results.both_panels_side_by_side: PASS - Building panel x=0 w=320, CommandCenter x=320 w=1600
test_results.project_highrise_label_faint: PASS - visible only on lg screens as per design
test_results.quest_selection_lights_building: PASS - EP updates on selection, building panel remains visible
test_results.launch_mission: PASS - transitions to TrackingMode with task cards, streak counter, buffer badge
test_results.speak_removed: PASS - grep found zero speak() calls in TrackingMode.jsx
